summary: PMS Rooms Tab Quick Actions Testing - 7/8 backend tests passed, UI components verified. CRITICAL ISSUE: GET/PUT /api/pms/guests/{id} endpoints are MISSING (404), which breaks the Identity Dialog save functionality. C/In buttons, balance display, and guest name click work correctly. No C/Out or Payment buttons visible because there are no checked_in bookings with checkout=today in test data.

critical.issue: Endpoint does not exist - returns 404. RoomsTab.js line 123 calls this endpoint when guest is not in local cache
Endpoint does not exist - returns 404. RoomsTab.js line 147 calls this endpoint in handleSaveIdentity(). Identity dialog 'Kaydet' (Save) button will fail silently or show error toast

minor.issue: Returns 400 'Room not ready. Status: dirty' when room status is dirty - this is expected behavior

integration_issues.issue: Save button calls PUT /api/pms/guests/{id} which doesn't exist. Will show 'Kimlik bilgileri kaydedilemedi' error toast

action_items: CRITICAL: Add GET /api/pms/guests/{id} endpoint to return single guest by ID
CRITICAL: Add PUT /api/pms/guests/{id} endpoint to update guest identity fields (name, id_type, id_number, nationality, date_of_birth)
Verify C/Out button appears when a booking has status=checked_in AND check_out=today
Verify Payment button appears when booking has status=checked_in
critical_code_review_comments: RoomsTab.js line 147: axios.put(`/pms/guests/${identityGuest.id}`, identityGuest) - endpoint doesn't exist
Backend pms.py only has POST /pms/guests and GET /pms/guests (list), no single guest GET/PUT endpoints
The roomGuestMap logic correctly filters bookings where ci <= today && co > today
showCheckIn correctly checks isCheckInToday && (status=confirmed OR guaranteed)
isOccupied correctly checks status=checked_in for Payment button

success_rate.backend: 87.5% (7/8 tests passed, 1 skipped - no checked_in bookings)
success_rate.frontend: UI components verified - 41 room cards, 3 C/In buttons, 3 clickable guest names, 3 balance displays, Identity dialog opens

seed_data_creation: None - used existing bookings with check_in=2026-03-19
context_for_next_testing_agent: Missing backend endpoints for single guest GET/PUT. RoomsTab quick actions UI elements work but Identity dialog save fails due to missing PUT endpoint. Need to create checked_in bookings with check_out=today to test C/Out and Payment buttons. Frontend login requires manual localStorage token setting in Playwright due to session persistence issues.

ui_verification.balance_format: Bakiye: X.XX (Turkish format with comma decimal)
